/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main.dir/main_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/Admin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/Cart.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/Customer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/Product.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/User.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/UserWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/OrderManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/MainPage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/LoginPage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/RegisterPage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/CustomerPage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/AdminPage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/CheckoutDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/SalesDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o -o main  /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.3
